heading_content_part: Privacy Policy - Shinycore SoftwarePrivacy PolicyShinycore Software respects the privacy of our users. This privacy policy applies to the applications provided by Shinycore Software.

Non-Personal InformationWe do not collect any personal information. We may collect non-personal information to improve our applications and services. This may include various technical information about your device, such as screen resolution, operating system version, device type, country, language, and application version. This anonymous data is not shared with any other party.

Third Party ServicesOur paid applications do not contain third party services. Applications that we provide for free may include analytics and ad serving services provided by third parties. Currently these are Google Analytics and Admob by Google, please read and review their privacy policy athttps://www.google.com/policies/privacy/.
Your ConsentBy using our applications you consent to this privacy policy.
UpdatesIf we decide to make changes to our privacy policy this page will be updated to reflect those changes.

Contact InformationIf you have questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us at[email protected].© 2017 Shinycore Software. All rights reserved.
